title: senecio leptolobus
intro: Senecio leptolobus, also known as the brittleleaf ragwort or brittleleaf, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, as well as its ability to act as a bitter and expectorant. The health benefits of Senecio leptolobus include its potential to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a treatment for digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
